name: Activity Dashboard
description: Displays aggregated per-project activity statistics including task counts, success rates, token usage, sparkline history, and duration metrics in a scrollable dashboard panel and dialog.

Dialogs/ActivityDashboardDialog.cs.content:
class ActivityDashboardDialog
  L14: Show(ObservableCollection<AgentTask> activeTasks, ObservableCollection<AgentTask> historyTasks, List<ProjectEntry> savedProjects) -> void

class ActivityDashboardManager

  L35: MarkDirty() -> void
  L37: RefreshIfNeeded(ScrollViewer container, string? currentProjectPath = null) -> void
  L44: RefreshContent(ScrollViewer container, string? currentProjectPath = null) -> void
  L51: ComputeStats(string? currentProjectPath = null) -> List<ProjectActivityStats>
  L188: BuildDashboardContent(bool isDialog, string? currentProjectPath = null) -> StackPanel

Models/ProjectActivityStats.cs.content:
class ProjectActivityStats
  ProjectPath: string
  ProjectName: string
  ProjectColor: string
  TotalTasks: int
  CompletedTasks: int
  FailedTasks: int
  CancelledTasks: int
  RunningTasks: int
  SuccessRate: double
  FailureRate: double
  AverageDuration: TimeSpan
  TotalDuration: TimeSpan

  LongestDuration: TimeSpan?
  TotalInputTokens: long
  TotalOutputTokens: long
  TotalCacheReadTokens: long
  TotalCacheCreationTokens: long
  MostRecentTaskTime: DateTime?
  RecentActivity: List<SparklinePoint>

  Timestamp: DateTime
  Succeeded: bool
  Duration: TimeSpan

patterns: Computed stats from in-memory task collections
